min_child_entry_age.source_quote: 1. Suitability Entry Age: Minimum Child- 0 days Dependent children between 0 days and 5 years can be insured only when both parents are getting insured. Adult- 18 years

sum_insured_options.source_quote: Suitability 1. Sum Insured options (in ₹) : • 15 Lacs • 20 Lacs • 25 Lacs • 5 Lacs • 7.5 Lacs • 10 Lacs 2. Zone(s)

grace_period.source_quote: At the end of the policy period - the policy shall terminate and can be renewed within the Grace Period of 30 days to maintain continuity of benefits without break in policy.

free_look_period.source_quote: 9. Free Look Period: The insured person shall be provided a free look period of thirty days beginning from the date of receipt of the policy document

initial_waiting_period_days.source_quote: iii. 30 Days Waiting Period (Code- Excl 03): a. Expenses related to the treatment of any Illness within 30 days from the first Policy commencement date shall be excluded except claims arising due to an Accident, provided the same are covered.

pre_existing_disease_waiting_months.source_quote: Expenses related to the treatment of a Pre-Existing Disease (PED) and its direct complications shall be excluded until the expiry of 36 months of continuous coverage after the date of inception of the first Policy with Us.

specific_disease_waiting_months.source_quote: Expenses related to the treatment of the listed Conditions, surgeries/treatments shall be excluded until the expiry of 24 months of continuous coverage after the date of inception of the first Policy with Us.

maternity_waiting_months.source_quote: subject to a waiting period of 2 years of continuous coverage of the insured person(s) under this cover with Us.

pre_hospitalization_days.source_quote: b. Pre-Hospitalization expenses: Covers Medical Expenses incurred upto 90 days prior to the date of admission to the Hospital.

post_hospitalization_days.source_quote: c. Post-Hospitalization expenses: Covers Medical Expenses incurred upto 90 days immediately after the Insured Person was discharged post Hospitalisation.

day_care_treatments_count.source_note: Per insurer baseline (Tata AIG product pages state 540+ day care procedures)

network_hospital_count.source_note: 12,000+ Network Hospitals (homepage 'Why TATA AIG' section, scraped 2026-05-15)

co_payment_pct.source_quote: no mandatory co-payment percentage stated; co-payment is referenced only as an optional/conditional feature ('The policies would however be subject to all limits, sub limits, Co-Payments, Aggregate Deductibles (If opted) as per the Policy contract') with no fixed percentage in any of the 20 indexed brochure chunks (checked all indexed chunks)

policy_term_options_years.source_quote: Cover Ceasing age There is no maximum cover ceasing age under this policy. Policy Term 1 Year/ 2 Years/ 3 Years Coverage Options Individual/Family floater Age of Proposer 18 years or above

ayush_coverage.source_quote: g. AYUSH Benefit: Covers medical Expenses incurred for In-patient/Day care treatment taken in an AYUSH hospital/AYUSH day care centre, including pre and post hospitalization expenses.

maternity_coverage.source_quote: b. Maternity Care : We will cover Maternity Expenses, Delivery Complications of a New Born Baby and First year Vaccinations of the New Born Baby, subject to a waiting period of 2 years of continuous coverage of the insured person(s) under this cover with Us.

newborn_coverage.source_quote: b. Maternity Care : We will cover Maternity Expenses, Delivery Complications of a New Born Baby and First year Vaccinations of the New Born Baby, subject to a waiting period of 2 years of continuous coverage of the insured person(s) under this cover with Us.

organ_donor_expenses.source_quote: e. Organ Donor: Covers Medical Expenses incurred by or in respect of the organ donor, for an organ transplant Surgery, solely towards the harvesting of the organ donated. The insured person must be the recipient of the organ so donated by the organ donor.

restoration_benefit.source_quote: d. Restore Infinity Plus: We will provide reinstatement of the base sum insured, if the Sum Insured and Cumulative Bonus (if accrued) is insufficient to pay an admissible Hospitalization claim in the Policy.

domiciliary_treatment.source_quote: f. Domiciliary Treatment: Covers Medical Expenses related to Domiciliary Hospitalization of the

cashless_treatment_supported.source_quote: d. Procedure for availing cashless facility: • For any emergency Hospitalisation, our TPA/We must be informed within 24 hours after hospitalization.

no_claim_bonus_cap_pct.source_quote: 1) Cumulative Bonus: If you choose Cumulative Bonus, 50% Cumulative Bonus will be applied on the Sum Insured for every claim free policy year subject to maximum of 100% of the sum insured.

geographic_coverage.source_quote: This Policy only covers claims incurred within India, and payments under this Policy shall only be made in Indian Rupees within India.
